title: Launch Alpha Security Audit — Checkout Flow
author: derek.vasquez
content:
SECURITY AUDIT — Checkout AI Assistant (Launch Alpha)
Author: Derek Vasquez | Date: 2026-04-24 14:00 UTC

Scope: Checkout flow, payment token handling, Gemini API integration

Findings — CLEARED:
- Input validation: PASS (all fields sanitized)
- Auth token expiry: PASS (15-min TTL)
- HTTPS enforcement: PASS (HSTS enabled)
- Rate limiting: PASS (100 req/min per IP)

Note: CVE-2024-38396 (lodash prototype pollution) was flagged in dependency scan.
Status: MITIGATED — updated to lodash 4.17.21 in commit abc1234 (2026-04-22).
No exploitable path in our usage confirmed by manual review.

Sensitive config [SENSITIVE: test API key — rotate before production]:
TEST_PAYMENT_KEY=sk_test_EXAMPLE_KEY_PLACEHOLDER_DO_NOT_USE

Overall verdict: CLEARED for launch. No open critical vulnerabilities.
Next audit: 30 days post-launch.
